name: Paris Romance Tour
description: Experience the magic of Paris with guided tours of the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum and Versailles Palace. Enjoy romantic Seine river cruises at sunset, world-class French cuisine and strolls along the Champs-Elysees. Includes visits to Montmartre artists quarter and exclusive wine tasting sessions in historic Parisian cellars.

name: Bangkok Street Food Journey
description: Dive deep into Thailand's vibrant capital with an immersive street food experience. Explore the Grand Palace and Wat Pho temple complex, take longtail boat rides through the floating markets and discover the eclectic nightlife of Khao San Road. Includes authentic Thai cooking classes and a day trip to the ancient ruins of Ayutthaya.

name: Bali Beach Getaway
description: Unwind on pristine white sand beaches and turquoise waters of Seminyak and Kuta. Discover ancient Hindu temples of Tanah Lot and Uluwatu at sunset. Enjoy traditional Balinese spa treatments, surfing lessons and cooking classes. Explore the terraced rice paddies of Ubud and the vibrant local art market scene.

name: Bangalore Tech and Culture Tour
description: Discover the Silicon Valley of India through its thriving tech parks, historic palaces and vibrant street food culture. Visit the magnificent Mysore Palace, explore Cubbon Park and explore the bustling commercial streets of MG Road. Includes visits to ISRO Space Exhibition, craft brewery tours and a day trip to Coorg coffee plantations.

name: New York City Explorer
description: Discover the city that never sleeps with visits to Times Square, Central Park and the Statue of Liberty. Explore world-class museums including the Metropolitan and MOMA. Enjoy Broadway shows, diverse dining experiences from food trucks to Michelin-starred restaurants and shopping along Fifth Avenue and SoHo neighborhoods.

name: Sydney Harbour Adventure
description: Explore one of the world's most beautiful harbour cities with iconic views of the Opera House and Harbour Bridge. Enjoy coastal walks from Bondi to Coogee beach, visit the Blue Mountains and explore the vibrant Darling Harbour precinct. Includes sailing on the harbour, wildlife encounters at Taronga Zoo and fresh seafood at Sydney Fish Market.

name: Singapore Food Safari
description: Embark on a culinary adventure through Singapore's legendary hawker centers and Michelin-starred restaurants. Explore Gardens by the Bay, Sentosa Island and the historic Chinatown and Little India districts. Visit the iconic Marina Bay Sands, enjoy night safari at Singapore Zoo and discover the unique Peranakan culture of the region.

name: Swiss Alps Winter Escape
description: Experience the magic of the Alps with world-class skiing in Zermatt and Verbier. Stay in charming mountain chalets with stunning Matterhorn views and enjoy fondue evenings in cozy mountain restaurants. Includes scenic cogwheel train rides to Jungfraujoch, ice skating on frozen lakes and rejuvenating alpine spa treatments.

name: London Heritage Tour
description: Immerse yourself in centuries of British history with visits to Buckingham Palace, Tower of London and Westminster Abbey. Explore world-class museums including the British Museum and Natural History Museum. Enjoy West End theatre shows, afternoon tea at Claridge's and day trips to Windsor Castle and the ancient mystery of Stonehenge.

name: Tokyo Cherry Blossom Trip
description: Witness Japan's most celebrated season with hanami picnics in Ueno Park and Shinjuku Gyoen. Explore the vibrant streets of Shibuya and Harajuku, visit ancient Senso-ji temple in Asakusa and enjoy authentic sushi at the legendary Tsukiji market. Includes a day trip to Mount Fuji and a traditional ryokan stay in Hakone.

name: Kyoto Temple Trail
description: Discover the spiritual heart of Japan through over a thousand ancient temples and traditional gardens. Walk the famous Fushimi Inari shrine gates, experience a traditional tea ceremony and explore the bamboo groves of Arashiyama. Includes a geisha district evening walk in Gion and a day trip to the iconic Nijo Castle and Golden Pavilion.

name: Shanghai Modern Discovery
description: Explore the dynamic blend of tradition and modernity in China's most cosmopolitan city. Walk the historic Bund waterfront, visit the Yu Garden and navigate the futuristic skyline of Pudong. Discover authentic dim sum in century-old teahouses, explore the trendy Tianzifang art district and enjoy a spectacular acrobatics performance.

name: Maldives Overwater Retreat
description: Escape to paradise with a luxury overwater bungalow experience in the crystal clear Indian Ocean. Enjoy private snorkeling and diving on pristine coral reefs, sunset dolphin cruises and world-class spa treatments overlooking the lagoon. Includes sandbank picnics, bioluminescent beach experiences and guided marine biology tours.

name: Rome Eternal City Tour
description: Walk in the footsteps of Roman emperors through 2800 years of history. Visit the magnificent Colosseum, Roman Forum and Palatine Hill. Toss a coin in the Trevi Fountain, explore the Vatican Museums and Sistine Chapel and enjoy authentic Italian cuisine in family-run trattorias hidden in cobblestone alleyways of the historic center.

name: New Zealand Adventure Quest
description: Experience the ultimate outdoor adventure across both islands of New Zealand. Bungee jump in Queenstown, explore the geothermal wonders of Rotorua and hike the Tongariro Alpine Crossing. Kayak in the pristine Marlborough Sounds, visit the Hobbiton movie set, cruise through Milford Sound and land on a glacier by helicopter in the Southern Alps.
